mapper.select:
SELECT da.ma_du_an, da.ten_du_an, da.ngay_bat_dau, da.ngay_ket_thuc_du_kien, da.ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te, da.trang_thai, da.luong_trach_nhiem,
lda.ma_loai_du_an, lda.ten_loai_du_an, lda.so_nhan_vien_toi_da,
pb.ma_phong_ban, pb.ten_phong_ban FROM du_an da JOIN loai_du_an lda ON da.ma_loai_du_an = lda.ma_loai_du_an JOIN phong_ban pb ON da.ma_phong_quan_ly = pb.ma_phong_ban
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO du_an ( ten_du_an, ngay_bat_dau, ngay_ket_thuc_du_kien, ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te, trang_thai, ma_loai_du_an, ma_phong_quan_ly, luong_trach_nhiem ) VALUES ( #{tenDuAn}, #{ngayBatDau}, #{ngayKetThucDuKien}, #{ngayKetThucThucTe}, #{trangThai}, #{maLoaiDuAn}, #{maPhongQuanLy}, #{luongTrachNhiem} )
mapper.update: UPDATE du_an SET ten_du_an = #{tenDuAn}, ngay_bat_dau = #{ngayBatDau}, ngay_ket_thuc_du_kien = #{ngayKetThucDuKien}, ngay_ket_thuc_thuc_te = #{ngayKetThucThucTe}, trang_thai = #{trangThai}, ma_loai_du_an = #{maLoaiDuAn}, ma_phong_quan_ly = #{maPhongQuanLy}, luong_trach_nhiem = #{luongTrachNhiem} WHERE ma_du_an = #{maDuAn}
